Oleh karena itu, Perseroan tidak menyajikan informasi terkait aksi korporasi. Throughout the 2023 fiscal year, the Company did not conduct any corporate actions (stock split), stock merger (reverse stock), stock dividends, bonus shares, changes in the nominal value of shares, issuance of convertible securities, or additions and subtractions of capital. Therefore, the Company does not provide information related to corporate actions. Peristiwa Penting Event Highlights 10 April 2023 | 10th April 2023 Pembukaan Gerai Pertama Grillman Opening of Grillman’s First Outlet Pembukaan gerai pertama Grillman di Summarecon Bekasi pada tanggal 10 April 2023. Grillman adalah merek restoran baru Perseroan yang menyajikan perpaduan makanan Korea- Jepang yang mayoritas disajikan menggunakan hotplate. Opening of Grillman first outlet in Summarecon Bekasi on 10th April, 2023.
